prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约13313名→12411名→9409名→8378名→7586名，整体呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约5727名，2025年基准位次约7586名，录取难度 逐年上升；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年25人、2022年29人、2023–2025年均为30人，2026年增至33人，较2025年扩招3人（+10%）， 扩招在一定程度上缓解了竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名（2025年为第48名），排名有所下滑但仍处于全国前列。
4 .【声誉热度】该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音平台关注度一般；无投档线断档或暴跌记录，录取走势稳定；该 校以石油石化特色见长，石油工程、油气储运工程等核心专业在行业内具有较强影响力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业社会热度平稳；云南省2026年普通高考总人数约37 .79万，按历史比例估算物理类考生约22.92万人，较2025年（17.33万人）增加约32%，考生规模大幅增长将加剧竞争；2026年；该 校位于北京市。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+10%）、 以及云南省物理类考生规模大幅增长（+32%）等关键因素，扩招虽缓解部分压力，但考生增量远超扩招幅度，竞争预计进一步加剧。在2025年基准位次7586名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约8121名，区间7621–8621名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 13313 → 12411 → 9409 → 8378 → 7586, showing a continuous upward trend overall, with a cumulative increase of about 5727 positions in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7586, and admission difficulty is increasing year by year. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science (physics category) was 25 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 30 from 2023 to 2025, and increased to 33 in 2026, an expansion of 3 students (+10%) compared to 2025, which alleviates competition pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 62nd (48th in 2025), with a slight decline but still among the top nationally. 4. [Reputation and Popularity] The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion; attention on Douyin platform is average; no record of cutoff line drops or crashes, with stable admission trends; the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with core majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil & Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering having strong influence in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of related engineering majors is stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is about 377,900, with an estimated 229,200 physics category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (173,300 candidates). The significant growth in candidate numbers will intensify competition; in 2026; the university is located in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+10%), and the significant increase in the number of physics category candidates in Yunnan Province (+32%), although the expansion alleviates some pressure, the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion, and competition is expected to further intensify. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7586, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 8121, with a range of 7621–8621.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (7621–8621), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7621), you can focus on reaching for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8621), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
